summary: Horizontal video. A local TV news package about a Venezuelan national charged in a Mecklenburg County, NC murder. It includes a stand-up reporter, the suspect's mugshot, and on-screen fact bullets. It is a broadcast news clip reposted by ICE, with no music track.
notable_text: ACCUSED OF KILLING 44-YEAR-OLD LUDVIN GUZMAN MORALES ON JANUARY 24TH; ICE DETAINER
